posts.text:
To understand Donald Trump’s America, it’s worth taking a road trip around the country. And if you can’t do that, then listen to The Economist’s new podcast series, “Tocqueville Road Trip”. @JohnPrideaux has followed in the footsteps of Alexis de Tocqueville, a young French aristocrat, who travelled around America in the 19th century. John’s journey takes him from New York to Michigan to Washington. 

Click the link to listen http://econ.st/4vhAPvn
posts.author: TheEconomist
